sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n423" key="a)gelaiotro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγελαιο-τρόφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n423.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keeping herds</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:26:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26.6</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
